title: SmoothCraft
description: The Best Fabric FPS mod pack for adding more performence, adding the prettiest menu and many other!
body:
# 🦌 SmoothCraft — The Ultimate Performance & Visual Enhancement Modpack  

![SmoothCraft Banner](https://imgur.com/tx7rEVY.gif)  

**SmoothCraft** is a meticulously crafted **Fabric-based modpack** designed to **maximize FPS** while delivering breathtaking visuals. Built on industry-leading optimizations like **Sodium, Lithium, and Iris Shaders**, it transforms Minecraft into a **smoother, prettier, and more immersive** experience—without sacrificing performance.  

---

## ✨ **Why Choose SmoothCraft?**  
✅ **Unrivaled Performance**  
- Powered by **Sodium, Lithium, and Starlight** for buttery-smooth gameplay, even on mid-range PCs.  
- **Reduced lag spikes** and optimized chunk loading for seamless exploration.  

✅ **Stunning Visuals, Zero Compromises**  
- Full **shader support** (Iris) with presets tailored for balance between beauty and FPS.  
- Enhanced lighting, shadows, and textures **without the typical performance hit**.  

✅ **Lightweight & Stable**  
- **No bloat**—only essential optimizations and carefully selected visual mods.  
- **Fewer crashes** thanks to rigorous compatibility testing.  

✅ **Community-Approved**  
- Trusted by **thousands of players** and continuously updated for the best experience.  

---

## 🖼️ **Performance Showcase**  

### **Tested on:**  
- **CPU:** AMD Ryzen 5 3400G  
- **GPU:** Vega 11 Integrated (4GB VRAM)  
- **RAM:** 16GB DDR4 @ 2666MHz  
- **Resolution:** 1080p  

### **Benchmark Results**  
| Settings          | Render Distance | Avg FPS  | Shaders         |
|-------------------|-----------------|----------|-----------------|
| **Ultra**         | 8 chunks        | 250-290  | ❌ Disabled     |
| **Balanced**      | 12 chunks       | 120-180  | ❌ Disabled     |
| **Shader**        | 8 chunks        | 45-70    | ✅ Bliss        |


📌 *Results with Bliss shaders and 4GB RAM allocation*

### **Visual Comparison**  
| ![Vanilla Performance](https://imgur.com/JAqi04a.png) | ![Shader Performance](https://imgur.com/YxD44Vg.png) |
|:------------------------------:|:------------------------------:|
| **270+ FPS** - Default settings | **45-70 FPS** - Shaders enabled |

---

## ⚙️ **System Requirements**  
### **Minimum (720p/30fps)**  
- CPU: AMD Ryzen 3 2200G / Intel i3-8100  
- GPU: Vega 8 / Intel UHD 630 (2GB VRAM)  
- RAM: 8GB DDR4 (4GB allocated)  

### **Recommended (1080p/60fps)**  
- CPU: AMD Ryzen 5 3400G / Intel i5-9400  
- GPU: Vega 11 / GTX 1050 (4GB VRAM)  
- RAM: 16GB DDR4 (6GB allocated)  

### **Shader-Ready**  
- Dedicated GPU: GTX 1650 / RX 5500 XT  
- RAM: 16GB+ (8GB allocated)  

---

## ⚙️ **Installation Guide**  
1. **Download** from:  
   - [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/smoothcraft-fabric)  
   - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/modpack/smoothcraft)  
2. **Allocate 6GB RAM or 4GB MIN** in your launcher  


---

## 🚀 **Optimization Tips**  
- **For APUs:** Set mipmap levels to 0 in video settings  
- **For Better FPS:** Lower your render distance to 4-6 chunks to avoid overloading your system.
- **Disable Clouds:** Turn off clouds in video settings to reduce unnecessary graphical load.
- **Use Lower FOV:** Set your FOV to 70-90 for better FPS.
- **For Lower-End Systems:** Use Fast Graphics and turn off smooth lighting for a smoother experience.

Want more tips? Join our server for additional optimization suggestions and great gameplay experience!
